creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 3, 2013 at 2:58 PM, Lev Serebryakov <lev@freebsd.org> wrote:
>   I  have same problem with ghc 7.4.2_1, FreeBSD 9-STABLE (r244958) on
>  amd64

Okay, it seems we have managed to locate a possible source for this
problem [1].  The fix has been merged back from CURRENT recently, so
please give it a try on 9-STABLE later than r251365.


[1] http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=251047
